I tried the JacKeTUs build but it didn't work. Link for the build: https://github.com/JacKeTUs/proton-ge-custom

It's not that hard. Let's help our Linux gaming friends.

gpu: AMD Radeon (radeonsi, gfx1201, ACO, DRM 3.61, 6.14.2-201.nobara.fc41.x86_64)
notes:
I have done what others have mentioned, using custom proton fix, setting launch options, and changing JSON settings, but game will not load a race past 48% - 50%.

Whatever is causing this seems to break frequently after updates or something, and seems to be an arms race between the game and proton fixes.

I would hold off on this game on Linux until there's a solid fix.
